title: Update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.34.0 - autoclosed
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.34.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.34.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/compare/v5.33.1...v5.34.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/storage to v1.56.0, c/image to v5.33.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2625](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2625)
-   Update stubs to match signature of actual methods by [@​SpangleLabs](https://redirect.github.com/SpangleLabs) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2541](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2541)
-   docker: add check for too many parts by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2619](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2619)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/crypto to v0.29.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2624](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2624)

-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.62.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2630](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2630)

-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sigstore/sigstore to v1.8.10 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2601](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2601)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 to v2.20.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2611](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2611)
-   docker: drop use of external distribution challenge pkg by [@​flavianmissi](https://redirect.github.com/flavianmissi) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2629](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2629)

-   Improve an error message by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2595](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2595)
-   Propagate `CompressedDigest`/`CompressedSize` when reusing data from another layer by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2583](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2583)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.62.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2640](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2640)

-   Two small lint updates by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2642](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2642)
-   Use testify's ErrorAs to simplify tests a bit by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2641](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2641)
-   Fix excessive memory and disk usage when sharing layers by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2636](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2636)
-   Fix a missing s.lock.Unlock() on an error path by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2643](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2643)
-   In pulls, compute DiffIDs earlier, and also for v2s2 by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2635](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2635)
